title: alangium ebenaceum
intro: Alangium ebenaceum, also known as the black elder or Chinese parasol tree, is a plant species native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Cornaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Alangium ebenaceum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant protection, which may help prevent chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. Alangium ebenaceum is commonly prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
